description: Schema for defining archive session configurations and file archiving tasks

$schema.description: The schema against which to verify this document

$id.description: A unique identifier for the schema resource

version.description: The software version compatible with this data structure

session_name.description: The descriptive name of the session

dirname.description: Absolute path to the directory where archives are generated

tasks.description: A list of archive batch creation tasks

items.description: Configuration parameters for a specific task.

checked.description: Task selection state between Unchecked (value 0), Checked (value 1), or Indeterminate (value 2)

files_model.description: Definition of files to be included in the archive

root_path.description: Absolute path to the source directory containing files to be archived

check.description: A map of absolute file paths to their inclusion status

^([a-zA-Z]:[\\\\/]|/)[^<>:\"|?*]+(?:\\.[.description: The selection status of the file between Unchecked (value 0), Checked (value 1), or Indeterminate (value 2)

packer_data.description: Configuration settings for the archiving tool

type.description: The numeric ID of the archiving tool to be used

compression_method.description: The numeric ID of the compression algorithm

compression_level.description: The compression intensity level (0 for no compression)

dst_raw_basename.description: The base filename of the archive in the destination directory (excluding extension)

dst_folder.description: Absolute path to the destination directory for the archive
